package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_newreader_on_byte_slice_conversion: `strings.NewReader(string(b))` instead of `bytes.NewReader(b)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario659Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
